# منصة كتبي (Kotobi)

> Free Arabic digital library to read and download thousands of books, novels, and PDFs. Includes author pages, categories, quotes, reading clubs, and a community of Arabic readers.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Discover featured books, authors, and categories.
- [Books by Category](/categories): Browse the full library by category.
- [Authors](/authors): Browse Arabic authors and their works.
- [Quotes](/quotes): Curated quotes from books shared by the community.
- [Reading Clubs](/reading-clubs): Join or create reading clubs.
- [Daily Messages](/daily-messages): Daily inspirational messages for readers.
- [Suggestions](/suggestions): Personalized book suggestions.
- [Upload a Book](/upload-book): Contribute books to the library.
- [About Us](/about-us): What Kotobi is and the team behind it.
- [Contact Us](/contact-us): Get in touch.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How user data is handled.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Rules for using the platform.
